supply_chain.dependencies: Certain raw materials, medical devices and components necessary for commercial and clinical manufacturing are provided by single-source unaffiliated third-party suppliers. Single source for SureClick autoinjectors used in drug delivery. Substantial majority of commercial manufacturing at Puerto Rico facility. Substantial majority of clinical manufacturing at Thousand Oaks, California facility. Contract manufacturers added from Horizon acquisition, including single source suppliers for TEPEZZA drug substance and KRYSTEXXA drug substance in Israel.
supply_chain.risks: Natural disasters affecting Puerto Rico facility (hurricanes, earthquakes). Unreliable electric utility services in Puerto Rico. Single-source supplier dependencies. Quality issues with raw materials or components. Cyberattacks on supplier systems. Geopolitical conflicts affecting supply (ongoing conflicts in Ukraine and Middle East). Labor disputes or shortages. Regulatory compliance issues with third-party manufacturers. Contamination or recall risks. Capacity constraints at manufacturing facilities.

regulatory_risks: REMS (Risk Evaluation and Mitigation Strategies) requirements
Pricing and reimbursement pressures from government payers
Medicare price setting under Inflation Reduction Act (IRA)
Patent term extensions and supplemental protection certificates
CCPA (California Consumer Privacy Act) and state privacy laws
Environmental regulations and climate disclosure requirements
Healthcare fraud and abuse laws (Anti-Kickback, False Claims Act)
Tax law changes and OECD minimum corporate tax rate
BIOSECURE Act restrictions on contracting with certain biotechnology companies

sanction_risks: US government sanctions on Russia due to Ukraine conflict
Economic sanctions restricting commerce with Russia and certain regions of Ukraine
Potential sanctions on China-related entities under BIOSECURE Act
Middle East conflict disruptions affecting Israeli suppliers (KRYSTEXXA manufacturing)
Trade restrictions and tariffs affecting international operations
Export controls on biotechnology products and data
